operation.name: addOffsetPtr_at_psmgr_sendmsg
preconditions:
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun hdr_payload_len () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun wup_len () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (let ( (?B1 (concat  (select  hdr_payload_len (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  hdr_payload_len (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  hdr_payload_len (_ bv1 32) ) (select  hdr_payload_len (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) (and  (bvult  ?B1 (_ bv8 32) ) (=  (concat  (select  wup_len (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  wup_len (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  wup_len (_ bv1 32) ) (select  wup_len (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ?B1 ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun hdr_payload_len () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun wup_len () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (and  (=  false (bvult  (concat  (select  hdr_payload_len (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  hdr_payload_len (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  hdr_payload_len (_ bv1 32) ) (select  hdr_payload_len (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) (_ bv8 32) ) ) (=  (_ bv8 32) (concat  (select  wup_len (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  wup_len (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  wup_len (_ bv1 32) ) (select  wup_len (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)

oracle_spec.assertion: psmgr_session.role is interpreted consistently across all live consumers
assumptions: resource stays live while read under >= 2 incompatible models

metadata.wma: Logic-Induced Signal Divergence to Adversary-Controlled Memory Access
